description: CompositionBlack round neck, short sleeve t-shirt made of cotton-polyester with graphic print on the frontWash careHandwash or machine washFittingComfort FitIf health and style are your lifestyle mantras, there's no better tee than this black one from adidas. Made of a cotton-polyester mix, it keeps you cool and dry while you sweat it out at the gym. The very feminine graphic print on the front adds to the glamour factor while the short sleevs fit well around your well-toned arms allowing comfortable movement while exercising. Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts 2. Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-25"
